description: Source of truth for reasoning-effort levels (CLI/bridge providers: claude-code, codex). Consumed by Java backend (agent-common ReasoningEffort), Node bridge (mcp/bridge/lib/reasoningEffort.mjs), and frontend (frontend/lib/ai-providers/reasoningEffort.ts). Do NOT edit the generated files directly - edit this JSON then re-run scripts/generate-reasoning-effort.js. ReasoningEffortResolver.java (precedence logic) is hand-written and NOT generated.
